gateway/src/main/java/com/lucasm/gateway.general_idea: Externalize CORS allowed origins from hardcoded string to a configurable property with a default value.
Replace deprecated addAllowedOrigin with setAllowedOriginPatterns to support wildcard patterns and multiple origins.
Replace deprecated addAllowedMethod with setAllowedMethods using an explicit list of HTTP methods.
Replace deprecated addAllowedHeader with setAllowedHeaders using an explicit list.
Explicitly set the max age for preflight cache duration in the CORS configuration.

Refactor userResetQueue to use QueueBuilder and configure dead-letter arguments.

Add bean for User Reset Dead Letter Queue.
Add binding for User Registered Dead Letter Queue to Dead Letter Exchange.
Add binding for User Reset Dead Letter Queue to Dead Letter Exchange.
